title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised)
description:
The RBI clarified that IPCs will be treated as financial guarantees with a 100% credit conversion factor. However, capital is required only on the capital market exposure portion, with a 125% risk weight applied.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) appeared first on TaxGuru.
